items.name: VEX-Vertex-Encrypted-eXchange-3D-file-format
items.description: An open-source 3D file format built for games and engines. Binary, encrypted, and compressed — it packs the model and texture into a single file. Data is structured GPU-ready with no parsing needed, making load times significantly faster than OBJ or FBX. Lightweight, blazing fast, and readable in any language.
